content.raw:
EMPLOYMENT CONTRACT

Between:
{{employerName}} (hereinafter referred to as "the Employer")
and
{{employeeName}} (hereinafter referred to as "the Employee")

1. COMMENCEMENT DATE
This contract shall commence on {{startDate}}.

2. POSITION
The Employee is employed as {{position}}.

3. REMUNERATION
The Employee shall receive a monthly salary of {{salary}}.

4. WORKING HOURS
Normal working hours are {{workingHours}} per week.

5. LEAVE
{{leaveDays}} days annual leave per year.

6. NOTICE PERIOD
{{noticePeriod}} notice period applies.

Signed at {{place}} on this {{day}} day of {{month}} {{year}}.

_____________________
{{employerName}}

_____________________
{{employeeName}}

AGREEMENT OF SALE OF IMMOVABLE PROPERTY

1. PARTIES

1.1 The Seller:
{{sellerName}} (ID: {{sellerId}})

1.2 The Purchaser:
{{purchaserName}} (ID: {{purchaserId}})

2. PROPERTY
Erf {{erfNumber}} {{suburb}}, {{city}}

3. PURCHASE PRICE
{{purchasePrice}} ({{purchasePriceWords}})

4. DEPOSIT
{{deposit}} payable on {{depositDate}}

5. OCCUPATION DATE
{{occupationDate}}

6. CONDITIONS
{{conditions}}

7. TRANSFER
Transfer to be effected by {{conveyancer}}.

SIGNATURES:

_____________________
Seller

_____________________
Purchaser
